faqs.question: Which Medical fields offer the best work-life balance?
faqs.answer:
Some medical field which offe best work and life balance are shown below -
Dentistry (BDS & MDS) – Fixed clinic hours, fewer emergencies.
Pharmacy (BPharm & MPharm) – Less stress compared to hospital-based jobs.
Physiotherapy (BPT & MPT) – Flexible working hours, minimal emergency calls.
Public Health & Community Medicine – Focus on preventive healthcare rather than emergency treatments.
Clinical Research & Medical Writing – Research-based work with no direct patient responsibilities.

placements.overview: In Indira Gandhi Institute of Dental Sciences, 100 students admitted in year 2014-15, out of which 70 graduated in 2018-19. From this, 26 qualified students got placed with a median salary of Rs.340000 and 12 students got selected for higher studies. In year 2015-16, 95 students were admitted, out of which 91 graduated in 2019-20. From this, 40 qualified students got placed with a median salary of Rs.322000 and 34 students got selected for higher studies. In year 2016-17, 45 students were admitted, out of which 35 graduated in 2020-21. From this, 35 qualified students got placed with a median salary of Rs.320000.

reviews_list.batch_info: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2029
reviews_list.review_title: It is a good college. Its location is in a rural setup but is value for money.

review_content.Placements: Our college does not provide good placement opportunities to students. We have to do compulsory internships here for one year. The patient exposure is not that satisfying, but apart from that everything else is good. However, I do not know the payment and the placement facilities that they provide.
review_content.Infrastructure: The overall infrastructure is good, but people coming from other parts of India may have struggled with hostel food and accommodation. Other than that, everything else is good. Campus life is good. It is clean and well-maintained. The library is full of knowledgeable books and is accessible to students.

reviews_list.batch_info: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2029
reviews_list.review_title: Good infrastructure and facilities are very good.

review_content.Placements: 100% of students get placed here every year. Compared with other colleges SBV provides better education with lower fees. More than 90% of students get internships. Each internship member will have a posting in every department. The pre-clinical posting will be provided for all.
review_content.Infrastructure: SBV has good classroom, labs, and best library. Hostel facility is very well. SBV provides separate hostel facilities for each department's students. Mass is very well. Library has all the books and good infrastructure. A lot of indoor and outdoor games are provided.

reviews_list.batch_info: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: The college is one of the top colleges in India, with very good facilities and teaching faculty.

review_content.Placements: There are 50 students in a batch at the college. The placements included government jobs, private sectors, dental clinics and higher studies. Overall, the BDS provides a wide range of opportunities for students in the college, which helps in securing a good future.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college has a very good infrastructure, including lecture halls, eight departments, a big library, etc. The college also provides good hostel facilities with good-quality food and rooms. The grounds and garden are present in the college, with many indoor and outdoor games.

reviews_list.batch_info: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2017
reviews_list.review_title: Review of Government Dental College, Trivandrum.

review_content.Placements: Our batch has 100 students. I got admission in 2012. There were 62 girls and 38 boys in our batch. Out of 100, only 54 students completed in 1st attempt, and the rest 46 are in the minor batch. If you do BDS from a government college, you will get 12,000-18,000 per month as a stipend for your internship, but you do not get this from a private dental college. After that, you have a scope to open a private dental clinic or do post-graduation or prepare for government job exams as a BDS doctor. The average package offered for an assistant dentist is around 15,000-20,000, which is a little less, but as you gain knowledge and experience, your earnings will also increase. If you do boost graduation from a government dental college, you can earn 70,000-1 Lac as a stipend per month, but you have to study hard and to crack this exam.

review_summary.college_name: Government Dental College, Trivandrum Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: A good choice for the artistic prodigies.

content.Placements: Students who appeared for NEET 2024 and secured good marks in the range 620- 650 are guaranteed seats for this course in this college. Then we have reservations for SC and ST students. During internships, we are offered a package of Rs 25,000 - Rs 50,000 per month depending on individual skill. A huge percentage of students passing out each year to get placed in good highly reputed firms. There exists an option for doing PG in the same college.
content.Infrastructure: Easily accessible facilities are provided in the college and hostel-like green campuses to free Wi-Fi. The college infrastructure promises a pleasant ambiance for each student to grow. In the hostel mess, the food is being served to medical students. Food safety standards are never ignored. The men's hostel cumulatively conducts sports, fests, and cultural programs for all the inmates to get involved.

individual_reviews.course: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: The college is one of the top colleges in India, with very good facilities and teaching faculty.

content.Placements: There are 50 students in a batch at the college. The placements included government jobs, private sectors, dental clinics and higher studies. Overall, the BDS provides a wide range of opportunities for students in the college, which helps in securing a good future.
content.Infrastructure: The college has a very good infrastructure, including lecture halls, eight departments, a big library, etc. The college also provides good hostel facilities with good-quality food and rooms. The grounds and garden are present in the college, with many indoor and outdoor games.

individual_reviews.course: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2017
individual_reviews.title: Review of Government Dental College, Trivandrum.

content.Placements: Our batch has 100 students. I got admission in 2012. There were 62 girls and 38 boys in our batch. Out of 100, only 54 students completed in 1st attempt, and the rest 46 are in the minor batch. If you do BDS from a government college, you will get 12,000-18,000 per month as a stipend for your internship, but you do not get this from a private dental college. After that, you have a scope to open a private dental clinic or do post-graduation or prepare for government job exams as a BDS doctor. The average package offered for an assistant dentist is around 15,000-20,000, which is a little less, but as you gain knowledge and experience, your earnings will also increase. If you do boost graduation from a government dental college, you can earn 70,000-1 Lac as a stipend per month, but you have to study hard and to crack this exam.

individual_reviews.course: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: A college with good faculty and facilities to learn BDS.

content.Placements: The admission to the college is done on the basis of NEET conducted by NTA. After quota for MBBS most of the students opt for BDS and the college is currently the 2nd most preferred dental college. Campus placements are not available. After course of 4.5 years internship is done for a year with a stipend of nearly 25000 rupees.
content.Infrastructure: The college lacks an academic block but the construction is under progress. Currently the college has sufficient clinics and pre-clinical labs for each department. A library with all necessary books is also present. A canteen is run by the workers' association which has special considerations for students and staffs. In terms of sports, it is very much active in the college with participation in all types of games and atheltics. The college donot have a Ladies hostel which is a thing to be considered seriously.

highlights.summary:
The NEET UG 2026 registration window is now closed for admission to the MBBS, BDS, and other courses. The exam is scheduled for May 3, 2026.

Here are some additional updates regarding the Narayan Medical College and Hospital:

faqs.answer: A:    Narayan Medical College and Hospital is a well-known institution for MD, MS, MBBS courses, and these programs are delivered by highly experienced faculty. Narayan Medical College and Hospital has course specializations in Anaesthesia, Biochemistry, Dermatology, General Medicine, Microbiology, Pediatrics, Pathology, Pharmacology, Physiology, Radiology, Anatomy, Obstetrics & Gynecology, Ophthalmology, ENT, General Surgery, Orthopaedics.
faqs.question: What all specializations are provided by the courses offered at Narayan Medical College and Hospital?

reviews_list.review_title: It provides good teachers, exposure. But there is miserable outdated infrastructure.

review_content.Placements: Placements in our course depend mostly upon interviews and entrance, and it does not make much difference. For clearing an interview students to need vast knowledge and experience, and this depends on how a college manages academics and gives students first-hand experience by directly allowing them to face patients. This is why patient flow is one of the most important factors students need to analyse before selecting a medical college. In this aspect, our college has satisfactory patient flow, and teachers are also highly experienced, and knowledgeable.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Perfect place to enter medical fraternity

review_content.Placements: I'm currently pursuing my MBBS, batch 2020-2021. There are a total 150 students in the batch, the MBBS guidelines by NMC don't exactly leave it upto the college's choices to teach the students. Gaining internship is not a hard deal in the course. It's just about the zeal and respect in pupils about the colleagues, teachers, juniors. The college makes you capable enough to live a royal life afterwards. It even offers certain post graduate programs.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college is not as old as many other institutes. But the rate of its progress is surely much better. The infrastru imrpovement takes place annually, feedbacks and reactions are apt. WiFi is provided in Libraries, Classrooms and libraries are fully air conditioned. Food in the mess, canteen, cafeteria, food court, and other fod corners is perfect. The best part is every place it whole heartedly open to suggestions and criticism.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Our college has good faculty members and provides good facilities.

review_content.Placements: Around 150 students got placed as medical officers after MBBS. The average salary package offered was Rs. 72,000 per month. Bihar government or any other state government will recruit students. Almost 100% of students got internships at Narayan Medical College. MBBS is the top course, along with B.Sc. nursing, B.Pharma, D.Pharma, agriculture, LL.B., BMLT, DMLT, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: Laboratories are very good. The lecture theatre is fully air-conditioned, and seats are provided with cushions. Professors use microphones to communicate with students. The hostel facilities are average. Around three students can stay in each room. The food quality is average. Sports are also available.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: If you have an option to go somewhere else, then do not come here. The campus rules are strict.

content.Placements: Most of the students passing from here are placed as there is a scarcity of doctors during COVID times. Students are working in AIIMS state hospitals and other reputed private hospitals. Most of them choose to take a break from work and prepare for PG examinations.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi facility is not available here. The food served in a mess is average. Hostels are crowded. Sports facilities are very less. The library is good. Some classrooms or lecture theatres do not have an air-conditioned facility. Overall, it is not worth the money we pay here. Labs have adequate apparatus, but they are not up to the mark.

college_info.intro:
Kalyani University offers a range of courses in fields like Arts, Science, Commerce, Fine Arts, Engineering, etc. Ug level courses are offered for 3 or 4 years. Similarly, PG programmes are offered for a duration of two years. The popular programmes offered at University of Kalyani are BTech and MBA. The university offers BTech specilisation in CSE, Electronics & Instrumentation, Information Technology, and others. After successful completion of the programmes, students can explore their career as Software Developers, Computer Engineers, Data Analyst, Systems Analysts, IT Consultants, etc
MBA is another popular programme. The university also offers a 2-year MBA programme at the PG level. MBA programme includes industry interactions, group presentations, field projects, case study analysis, and company visits to develop the practical skills of the students. Students can check the Kalyani University courses along with the eligibility criteria and the total course fee in the table provided below:

faqs.answer: A:    Kalyani University was founded in 1960 by the Government of West Bengal.The university has 62 affiliated colleges under its aegis in the districts of Nadia and Murshidabad. Kalyani University is a NAAC 'A' Grade institute and is recognised by the UGC and AIU. BTech is among the most popular courses offered at the University. The duration of the course is of 4 years. faqs.answer: Kalyani University admission to most of the courses are offered via scores of various state/ national-level entrance exams. However, the university does not conduct any entrance exams on its own, but it accepts a few state/ national-level entrances conducted by West Bengal state. These include WBJEE, WB JECA, WB JEMAT, CAT, MAT, GATE, etc., for admission to BTech, MCA, MBA and M.Tech programmes. For courses such as BCom, BA, BSc, MA, etc., direct admissions are offered to candidates based on their scores obtained in the previous qualifying exam. review_summary.college_name: Kalyani University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.A. (Hons.) in English - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Good faculty and academic environment, but the infrastructure can be improved.

content.Placements: English Honours is not a placement-oriented course in our college, so the percentage of students getting formal campus placements is very low. Most students either prepare for competitive exams or take up private jobs on their own. On average, 10-15 percent of students get some kind of job opportunity through the college's career cell or seminars.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure for the English honours department is decent and improving every year. Our classrooms are simple but well-maintained with proper seating and ventilation. The library is one of the best parts because it has a good collection of English literature books.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Information Technology - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: University of Kalyani review.

content.Placements: Companies are not coming to this college. This is only a government college, and there is nothing for placement. We have to suffer from a scarcity of placements. If you want placement, then you have to go outside for the company, and you will have to reach out by yourself to get that placement.
content.Infrastructure: I would say the college is good, but the infrastructure is not as good. The lab is also not well-maintained. The library is very good because it is a university library. Hostel facilities are decent, but the food quality is very bad. This is a government-funded university, so you get what is provided in government schools.

individual_reviews.course: B.A. (Hons.) in History - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: My sweet college in Tehatta.

content.Placements: This is a well-known college in Nadia. Almost 80% students got placed in B.A. Honors in history. The average package varies from 3 LPA to 6 LPA. Various companies come to our college and select the best students for their companies. About 40% student gets an internship. Many students got selected as lecturers and assistant professors in this course.
content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are well-designed, neat, and clean. There are CCTVs in almost all the classrooms. Digitally teaching equipment is also available. Everyone can get their necessary books related to their subjects in the library, which can help them. The hostel rooms are good. The food given in the hostel is hygienic. There are lots of opportunities in sports that students can avail themselves of.

individual_reviews.course: B.A. (Hons.) in Geography - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Not satisfied with the faculty.

content.Placements: The college itself doesn't provide any placement, but it conducts a lot of seminars related to placement, from which you can try to build a connection with the recruiter. The college, on its website, has an option for placement cell but whenever you try to contact them, they don't help.
content.Infrastructure: For geography, the infrastructure is not that good, the computer labs are not well structured, and the geography lab doesn't have all the instruments. The computer in the lab is not working properly. Teachers are very responsible for the curriculum of the course.

individual_reviews.course: B.A. (Hons.) in History - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Won't suggest anyone to take admission in this college.

content.Placements: The percentage of students who got placed is 70%. The lowest and the average packages are 1.20 LPA and 6 LPA. Top recruiting companies are TCS, Amazon, and Adani Green Energy. The percentage of students who got internships is about 12%, I don't know. The top role is surveyor.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities are average. Labs and classrooms lack modern equipment. Wi-Fi is slow and unreliable. Sports facilities are poor and not well-maintained. I am very satisfied with this college. In this hot summer, there are just 4 fans in our classroom. We have a decent room.

paragraphs: The admission process of Kalyani University is inclusive of multiple steps such as registering on the official website or the website of the admission conducting body or exam. Followed by applications, students are required to go through the selection rounds.

After the selection rounds are over, course-wise counselling is conducted again by the admission conducting body or a final merit list is released by the university with the names of the shortlisted applicants. All these steps are mentioned below in detail:

STEP 1:Kalyani University Application Process 2026:For the courses offered by Kalyani University where admission is merit-based, applications can be completed online at the official website. Along with filling the application form, candidates are required to pay an application fee and submit the relevant documents on the admission portal.

STEP 2: Kalyani University Entrance Exams, Counselling and Other Selection Rounds:Followed by applications, students are required to go through the selection rounds. After the selection rounds are over, course-wise counselling is conducted again by the admission conducting body or a final merit list is released by the University with the names of the shortlisted applicants.

STEP 3: Kalyani University Merit List, Admission Offers and Seat Confirmation:After the completion of the selection rounds, course-wise counselling is conducted for the final seat allotment as per the intake capacity. The final merit list is released by the University with the names of the shortlisted applicants. Those interested in final admission can confirm their seat by paying for the admission fee.
Candidates who qualify for the Kalyani University admission process have to pay the fee for respective UG & PG courses.

Coming to affordability, it is among the causes of many people quitting college or their degree. Although the availability of student loans and scholarships has made education more affordable, qualifying for one of these loans or scholarships frequently comes with a set of requirements that must be met.
The details onKalyani University feesin addition to the average salary for the popular UG & PG courses are listed in the table below:
Note: *Candidates are requested to visit the official website to learn more about Kalayni University fees and seat intake in detail.

Also, the Kalyani University seat capacity varies as per the course type. TheBSc programmehas avery large numberof seats available for eligible students. faqs.question: What is the admission process of Kalyani University?
faqs.answer: Kalyani University admissions are both merit and entrance-based for respective UG and PG courses. For a few UG courses such as B.Ed, BSc, MA, etc., admissions are offered based on candidates' merit scores obtained in their previous qualifying exam. Further, to get admission to courses such as BTech, MTech, MBA, etc., candidates have to qualify for state/ national-level entrance exams. As per the admission process, candidates also have to appear for other selection rounds such as Group Discussion and Personal Interview rounds for the respective courses. Later on, the selected students are allocated seats via a counselling process as per the seat capacity. Read more about the detailed University of Kalyani admission process 2023,here.

faqs.question: Can I get direct admission at Kalyani University?
faqs.answer: Kalyani University admission to most of the courses are offered via scores of various state/ national-level entrance exams. However, the university does not conduct any entrance exams on its own, but it accepts a few state/ national-level entrances conducted by West Bengal state. These include WBJEE, WB JECA, WB JEMAT, CAT, MAT, GATE, etc., for admission to BTech, MCA, MBA and M.Tech programmes. For courses such as BCom, BA, BSc, MA, etc., direct admissions are offered to candidates based on their scores obtained in the previous qualifying exam. For more details on Kalyani University list of accepted entrance exams course-wise,check out this link.

placement_data.title: Kalyani University Placement Overview 2025
paragraphs: The University has not released the placement report for the year 2025. However, NIRF report 2025 is available on the official website. As per the report, a total of 97 BTech students were placed during University of Kalyani placements 2024. The median package offered to BTech students was INR 6.96 LPA . Further, 240 PG (2-year) and 19 PG-Integrated students were placed during Kalyani University placements 2024. The median package for PG 2-year and PG integrated course stood at INR 9.30 LPA and INR 11 LPA, respectively.

faqs.question: Which sector involves the largest share of University of Kalyani alumni?
faqs.answer: According to unofficial sources, a large share of the University of Kalyani alumni are working in the Education sector (19%), followed by Engineering (13%). The detailed sector-wise distribution of alumni is illustrated in the table below: Sector Percentage of Alumni Education 19% Engineering 13% Research 12% Operations 12% Business Development 11% Sales 11% Information Technology 10% Others 12% NOTE: The sectors involved in the ‘Others’ category are Administrative, Finance, Media and Communication, Arts and Design, Marketing, Customer Success and Support, Programme and Project Management, and HR.

faqs.question: How are the BSc placements at Kalyani University?
faqs.answer: Based on ‘Verified Students Reviews’ on Shiksha, BSc students of Kalyani University provide a mixed bag of reviews for BSc placements. Many reviews suggest that around 60% students get placed across different specialisations. According the reviews, the highest package stood at INR 9 LPA, while the lowest package offered was INR 3 lakhs. However, students suggest that some of the specialisations do not have many placement opportunities. Following are few quotes from verified Shiksha reviews: "92% of the students got placed. The highest package offered was INR 9 LPA, the average package was INR 6 LPA and, lowest package offered was INR 3 LPA" (BSc Hons in Geography- Batch of 2025) “The highest salary package offered was INR 8 LPA” (BSc- Batch of 2023) “Top roles offered are professors and other jobs in the health sector.” (BSc Hons in Physiology- Batch of 2025) “The average salary offered was INR 25,000 per month.” (Bachelor of Science (BSc Hons- Batch of 2023)

highlights.description: Consistently recognised by numerous national ranking agencies, Kalyani University is one of India’s top institutes. Recently, the institute ranked #51-100 in the NIRF 2025 under the State Public University category. The reasons for its high ranks among numerous ranking agencies include its academic reputation, top-notch faculty, and well-laid infrastructure. The following article covers all the information around Kalyani University rankings:

nirf.description:
As per the overall score, Kalyani University has been placed at a good position by the NIRF under the 'State Public University' category, reflecting its exceptional performance in areas like Teaching, Research, Graduation Outcomes, and creating an inclusive, quality learning environment. It is observable that in the 'State Public University' category, the institute's ranks have shown stability in trend when evaluated against the ranking of the past year. In 2025, Kalyani University's rank is #51, the same as last year's rank in the 'State Public University' category by the NIRF ranking.
Check out the latest rankings for other ranking bodies and their categories below.
Read less

qs_world.description:
Kalyani University has been recognised for its excellence in various fields by QS World University Rankings 2026, outperforming other institutes in parameters such as Teaching, Graduation Outcome, Inclusivity & Research, as well as fostering an exceptional learning environment. One can observe that, in the 'Asia' category, the institute's ranks have displayed instability in comparison with last year's ranking. In 2026, Kalyani University fell 200 ranks to #1001 rank in the 'Asia' category by the QS World University Rankings.
It is to be noted that the institute has demonstrated a decreasing trend in the 'Southern Asia' category as compared to the ranking of preceding years. In 2026, Kalyani University fell 67 ranks to #330 rank in the 'Southern Asia' category by the QS World University Rankings. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has slipped in the rankings.
Explore the Kalyani University latest rankings by other ranking bodies and their categories below:

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Krishnagar Government CollegeReviewed on 18 Nov 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Good faculty and academic environment, but the infrastructure can be improved.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure for the English honours department is decent and improving every year. Our classrooms are simple but well-maintained with proper seating and ventilation. The library is one of the best parts because it has a good collection of English literature books.

reviews.review_heading: University of Kalyani review.
reviews.review_text: I would say the college is good, but the infrastructure is not as good. The lab is also not well-maintained. The library is very good because it is a university library. Hostel facilities are decent, but the food quality is very bad. This is a government-funded university, so you get what is provided in government schools.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Tehatta Government CollegeReviewed on 14 Sep 2025)
reviews.review_heading: My sweet college in Tehatta.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are well-designed, neat, and clean. There are CCTVs in almost all the classrooms. Digitally teaching equipment is also available. Everyone can get their necessary books related to their subjects in the library, which can help them. The hostel rooms are good. The food given in the hostel is hygienic. There are lots of opportunities in sports that students can avail themselves of.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Kalyani MahavidyalayaReviewed on 14 Sep 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Not satisfied with the faculty.
reviews.review_text: For geography, the infrastructure is not that good, the computer labs are not well structured, and the geography lab doesn't have all the instruments. The computer in the lab is not working properly. Teachers are very responsible for the curriculum of the course.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Kalyani MahavidyalayaReviewed on 11 Sep 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Won't suggest anyone to take admission in this college.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are average. Labs and classrooms lack modern equipment. Wi-Fi is slow and unreliable. Sports facilities are poor and not well-maintained. I am very satisfied with this college. In this hot summer, there are just 4 fans in our classroom. We have a decent room.

reviews.review_heading: It's a distinguished college because there are a lot of activities and fun.
reviews.review_text: The hostels, library, and instruments are all nicely maintained. The library room is fully air-conditioned, and the classrooms are under CCTV camera surveillance. All the safety and infrastructure are very good. There are nice canteens and a playing ground. Our course is very affordable for many students.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Ranaghat CollegeReviewed on 24 Aug 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Review of Ranaghat College.
reviews.review_text: My college has Wi-Fi connection in the classrooms and library, which gives us many benefits. Our college has a canteen where good food is available. Our college has a medical facility. If something happens to someone, they are given medicine from there. Our college has a big field where we sometimes play sports.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Ranaghat CollegeReviewed on 18 Aug 2025)
reviews.review_heading: The college is good for placements.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure for my course at Ranaghat College is well-developed, with spacious classrooms, updated labs, and a good library. Facilities are regularly maintained, and the environment is supportive of focused academic learning. The college fee is genuine.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Ranaghat CollegeReviewed on 18 Aug 2025)
reviews.review_heading: The college is good for placements.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure for my course at Ranaghat College is well-developed, with spacious classrooms, updated labs, and a good library. Facilities are regularly maintained, and the environment is supportive of focused academic learning. The college fee is genuine.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Ranaghat CollegeReviewed on 17 Aug 2025)
reviews.review_heading: College is good for placements.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure for my course at Ranaghat College is well developed, with spacious classrooms, updated labs, and a good library. Facilities are regularly maintained, and the environment is supportive of focused academic learning. The college fee is genuine.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Ranaghat CollegeReviewed on 7 Aug 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Overall, our college is good in every aspect. I am happy to study at this college.
reviews.review_text: All the things are available in our college that are on your list. Our college has no hostal, so this is a bad thing. Our college should improve this thing so I request our faculty to create a new hostel for long distance students who study well, that's all I want in my school.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Ranaghat CollegeReviewed on 7 Aug 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Why I prefer Ranaghat College.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure for my course at Ranaghat College is well-developed, with spacious classrooms, updated labs and a good library. Facilities are regularly maintained. The environment is supportive of focused academic learning. A new building is under construction.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Karimpur Pannadevi CollegeReviewed on 5 Aug 2025)
reviews.review_heading: It has outstanding faculty, great infrastructure and strong placements since 2015.
reviews.review_text: The campus infrastructure is well-maintained with high-speed Wi-Fi in classrooms, labs equipped with the latest tools, and a central library with a vast collection of books and digital resources. Hostels are clean and secure offering basic amenities. It also provides 24x7 water and electricity facilities.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Kalyani MahavidyalayaReviewed on 2 Aug 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Canteen is closed in our college. We hope they reopen the canteen again.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available in our college. Students can use the Wi-Fi for their studies. Our college library is very peaceful and helpful to us. We can get books for our needs. We can sit and study in the library. There are computers in the library that we can use, which is helpful for us. Classrooms are nice. Labs are also available in our college.

reviews.review_heading: University of Kalyani. Good learning and infrastructure in 2025.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi, seminar hall, library, classrooms, labs, and canteen are present. Quality is nice, especially food is fresh. Medical facilities are present, and sports are available only to physical education department. Sports events are held, and active participation is observed.

college_info.college_name: Kalyani University Scholarship Details

paragraphs: Kalyani University MBA fee is INR 70,000, which is a total tuition fee for two years. Candidates have to pay a tuition fee amount of  INR 35,000 for one year. Apart from this, students also have to pay for other one-time fee components such as Admission Fee, Library Fee, Sports Fee, Registration Fee, Identity Card Fee, Immigration Fee and Students-aid Fund.
Note: The above fee is taken from unofficial sources and hence, is indicative. Students are requested to visit the official website to get more details on the Kalyani University MBA fees.

At Kalyani University, the total tuition fee for a two-year B.Ed course is INR 7,200. However, this information is sourced from official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change. Students are requested to visit the official website to get more details on the Kalyani University B.Ed fee. Additionally, candidates also have to pay for other one-time fee components such as Admission Fee, Library Fee, Sports Fee, Registration Fee, Identity Card Fee, Immigration Fee and Students-aid Fund.

The tuition fee for a four-year BTech course at Kalyani University is INR 1.44 lakh. This fee is common for all BTech specialisations. Additionally, candidates also have to pay for other one-time fee components such as Admission Fee, Library Fee, Sports Fee, Registration Fee, Identity Card Fee, Immigration Fee and Students-aid Fund.
Note: The above fee is taken from unofficial sources and hence, is indicative. Students are requested to visit the official website to get more details on the Kalyani University BTech fee.

Yes, Kalyani university provides scholarships and fee waiver schemes to extend it support to deserving BSc programme students. Each scholarship is different to cater to varying needs of students. The BSc programme students can avail Scholarship for Talent Support, Akyashree Scholarship for Minority Students, Swami Vivekananda Merit-Cum-Means Scholarship, etc.

answer.text: Following are the industries that employ MD Dermatology candidates:IndustryDescriptionHealthcare IndustryHospitals, private clinics, and dermatology centers actively hire dermatologists.Cosmetic IndustryCompanies offering skincare products and cosmetic dermatology services recruit dermatologists for product development and consultancy.PharmaceuticalsPharmaceutical companies hire dermatologists for research and development of skin-related drugs and treatments.

faqs.question: Which industries hire MD Dermatology course graduates?

rows: Hospitals, private clinics, and dermatology centers actively hire dermatologists.
Companies offering skincare products and cosmetic dermatology services recruit dermatologists for product development and consultancy.
Pharmaceutical companies hire dermatologists for research and development of skin-related drugs and treatments.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: The land of future doctors.

review_content.Placements: Since our college is a government medical college in Karnataka the students who studies in our college must not worry about the placements because our state government provides the best internship amount around the country during the 5th year and job security once MBBS is done the person can work through lifetime in government hospitals of Karnataka. Even the private sector hospitals also have a huge demand on our students as we get exposed to many patients with different problems during the course and the expertise we are with after becoming doctors.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: It is a spacious campus, with very beautiful infrastructure and a very good library.

review_content.Placements: It is one of the best places. It has many facilities, and especially, the doctors are good and have good knowledge. The treatment provided is good. Cleanliness is maintained on campus. The treatment provided here is good compared to other government hospitals, and the beds are very clean. The management is good. So, I suggest this hospital for treatment at low costs.
review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi facility is not yet provided. The hostel is decent. The campus has a badminton court. Mess food is above-average. Rooms are cleaned regularly and are spacious. You're provided with a cot, chair and table. Security is always present. There are CCTV cameras for monitoring, but you always need to be careful and keep your room locked all the time. You get everything you expect from a government hostel.

review_summary.college_name: Bowring and Ladycurzon Medical college and Research Institute Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: It is a very good for academics.

content.Placements: There are 150 students per batch. As it is a medical college, there are no interviews but students have to complete an internship after 4 years of MBBS. All the students who complete 4 years of MBBS must have to complete a year of internship. During the internship, the government will pay a stipend of Rs.30,000 per month.
content.Infrastructure: Hostels are located very close to the college. Library is available in the college with air-conditioners and plenty of books for reference. There is a reading room and a reference section. Hostels are very good as they are newly built and well maintained. Mess and its food are good. Our college doesn't have ground.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: It is a new college associated with a very old and well renowned hospital.

content.Placements: The hospital associated with this college is one of the oldest hospitals in Karnataka, and the patient inflow is very high hence very great opportunity to learn new things. The hospital is well renowned all over Karnataka and this college is also very popular.
content.Infrastructure: It is a new building hence all the facilities are great. Each department has a separate floor hence very spacious. The laboratories are new with all new equipment. The hostel is also new with all good facilities. The library is big with all the books needed for the course.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: The land of future doctors.

content.Placements: Since our college is a government medical college in Karnataka the students who studies in our college must not worry about the placements because our state government provides the best internship amount around the country during the 5th year and job security once MBBS is done the person can work through lifetime in government hospitals of Karnataka. Even the private sector hospitals also have a huge demand on our students as we get exposed to many patients with different problems during the course and the expertise we are with after becoming doctors.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: It is a spacious campus, with very beautiful infrastructure and a very good library.

content.Placements: It is one of the best places. It has many facilities, and especially, the doctors are good and have good knowledge. The treatment provided is good. Cleanliness is maintained on campus. The treatment provided here is good compared to other government hospitals, and the beds are very clean. The management is good. So, I suggest this hospital for treatment at low costs.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi facility is not yet provided. The hostel is decent. The campus has a badminton court. Mess food is above-average. Rooms are cleaned regularly and are spacious. You're provided with a cot, chair and table. Security is always present. There are CCTV cameras for monitoring, but you always need to be careful and keep your room locked all the time. You get everything you expect from a government hostel.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied with its faculty members, placements, and infrastructure.

content.Placements: Around 97% of students were placed. The highest salary package offered was 50 million per annum, and the average salary package offered was around 27 million. All students got internships, and they were satisfied with this.
content.Infrastructure: Our college provides a huge library and all necessary books were available. The classrooms were huge with adequate spacing for all students. There was no canteen, but there were a lot of other options around the campus.

In respect of persons with disability candidates, the minimum qualifying marks in the said examinations shall be 45% in case of General Category and 40% in the case of Scheduled Castes, Scheduled Tribes, and Other Backward Classes. Candidates who have passed Class 12 from Open School or as private candidates shall not be eligible to appear for theNational Eligibility Cum Entrance Test'. However, this has been a subject matter of challenge before the Hon'ble High Court of Delhi, Hon'ble High Court of Allahabad, Lucknow Bench, and Hon'ble High Court of Madhya Pradesh at Jabalpur Result awaited candidates can also apply. The lower age limit is 17 years on or before 31st Dec of the year of admission.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Homeopathic Medicine and Surgery (BHMS) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: A good college for learning and to get clinical exposure in homeopathy.

content.Placements: Around 70% of students from my batch got placed. The college mainly focuses on clinical practice, higher studies, and government jobs, so placements are moderate. The highest package is 8 LPA, and the lowest package is 4 LPA. The average package is 6 LPA. Some top recruiters include homeopathic pharma companies, research institutes, private clinics, wellness centers, and a few hospital chains.
content.Infrastructure: The college has a decent infrastructure with well-maintained classrooms, laboratories, dissection halls, and a central library that provides access to standard homeopathic and medical textbooks. Wi-Fi facility is available, but mostly limited to the library and computer sections. Classrooms are equipped with projectors for teaching. The hostel facilities are average with basic amenities like clean rooms, drinking water, and security. The mess food is simple and hygienic, but not very diverse, as it's mostly home-style. The canteen provides snacks and basic meals at reasonable rates.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Homeopathic Medicine and Surgery (BHMS) - Batch of 2030
individual_reviews.title: College is very good for studying.

content.Placements: Our college hospital is very good. Many patients come to the hospital. An internship is provided by our hospital. The monthly salary for the internship is five thousand. The hospital is very good for the practice of homeopathy. Our hospital provides the best facilities.
content.Infrastructure: The college is very good. Smart boards are available in classrooms. The library is very good for homeopathic students. All types of books are available in the library. The labs are good. Wi-Fi is available in the college. A canteen is not available in the college. The hostel's mess food is good.

content.Infrastructure: College provides very good education and hospitality facilities. All facilities are good for studying. Per subject, four faculty members are available. All faculty members are very educated in Master's in Homoeopathy. A smart board is available in my college. The library is very good.

In the meantime, candidates can refer to the exam-wise sections below to view the Anand Homeopathic Medical College and Research institute cutoff for different courses, rounds, and categories to understand the past years' trends. A few more updates are below:

The Anand Homeopathic Medical College and Research institute BHMS Cutoff 2024 is out for the sixth round. The cutoff for the BHMS based on category for General, OBC, SC, ST, EWS and PWD category candidates are given in the table below. Examining the Round 6 Cutoff list, the closing ranks for General AI quota candidates was 229488. The most sought-after course as per the cutoff list is Bachelor of Homeopathic Medicine and Surgery (BHMS).

Anand Homeopathic Medical College and Research institute cutoff 2024 has been released for the fifth round, for the candidates seeking admission to the BHMS via AYUSH NEET. As per the AYUSH NEET UG Round 6 Seat Allotment Result, the most demanded course was Bachelor of Homeopathic Medicine and Surgery (BHMS) with a cutoff rank of 229488 for the students belonging to the General AI category.

Anand Homeopathic Medical College and Research institute admission to the UG courses is based on valid AYUSH NEET UG scores, followed by a counselling round. A direct link will be provided below to download the counselling result for AYUSH NEET 2024 counselling.

reviews.review_heading: A good college for learning and to get clinical exposure in homeopathy.
reviews.review_text: The college has a decent infrastructure with well-maintained classrooms, laboratories, dissection halls, and a central library that provides access to standard homeopathic and medical textbooks. Wi-Fi facility is available, but mostly limited to the library and computer sections. Classrooms are equipped with projectors for teaching. The hostel facilities are average with basic amenities like clean rooms, drinking water, and security. The mess food is simple and hygienic, but not very diverse, as...

reviews.review_heading: College is very good for studying.
reviews.review_text: The college is very good. Smart boards are available in classrooms. The library is very good for homeopathic students. All types of books are available in the library. The labs are good. Wi-Fi is available in the college. A canteen is not available in the college. The hostel's mess food is good.

reviews.review_heading: This college is good for studying.
reviews.review_text: College provides very good education and hospitality facilities. All facilities are good for studying. Per subject, four faculty members are available. All faculty members are very educated in Master's in Homoeopathy. A smart board is available in my college. The library is very good.

reviews.review_heading: My college is best in study.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is nice but old. College has its hospital and OPD. Hospitals have many patients. It is in connection with Shree Ram Krishna Seva Mondal. The hostel is very near the college. The hostel fees are Rs. 60,000 per year, including 2 times, our college is very nice. Our hospital gives the best facilities. Our hospital offers all types of treatment in homeopathy. Homeopathy has no side effects.  According to CBSC, our classrooms have smart boards. An anatomy lab with a cadaver with all or...

reviews.review_heading: Faculty is very helpful. All teachers are kind and helpful in nature Hostel food quality is poor.

Classrooms are big and well ventilated.

college_info.college_name: Gujarat Adani Institute of Medical Sciences: Courses, Fees, Admission 2025, Reviews, Info

highlights.summary:
The NEET UG 2026 registration window is now closed for admission to the MBBS, BDS, and other courses. The exam is scheduled for May 3, 2026.

Here are some additional updates regarding the Gujarat Adani Institute of Medical Sciences:

faqs.answer: A:    Gujarat Adani Institute of Medical Sciences has received an impressive review rating of 4.5 on Placements based on 16 feedback of verified Shiksha students.
faqs.question: Does Gujarat Adani Institute of Medical Sciences provide good placement facilities?

fees_and_eligibility.overview: At the UG and PG levels, Gujarat Adani Institute of Medical Sciences offers a diverse range of progammes. Candidates can choose Full Time courses, from stream like Medicine & Health Sciences. College offers MBBS courses at the UG level. While, at the PG level, the college offers available programmes like MD and MS. The Gujarat Adani Institute of Medical Sciences course fee ranges between INR 3,000 to 75,00,000.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: It is a great college for facilities, good placements and really good infrastructure.

review_content.Placements: 75% of students got placed in our course. 50% of students got internships from our course and MBBS students in the medical profession. Our course is the best for future.
review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi connection on our campus has low speed. The campus has labs and the best classrooms with AC. The library is available for reading, and library time for all students is from 9 am to 12 am, which is the best. Our campus has sports and medical facilities, and they are the best. A mess and canteen are also available.
review_content.Faculty: All the faculty are knowledgeable, and their teaching quality is the best. In our college, we have 4 exams per year, and university exams are important for our upgrade to the next year. It is not difficult to pass semester exams in our college.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: The college has good infrastructure and good facilities.

review_content.Placements: As the name of the college suggests that this college is for medical studies. It includes UG courses mainly as MBBS and also PG courses like ortho, dermatology, paediatrics, etc. It also includes paramedical courses like DMLT.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the campus includes all the necessary equipment for medical studies along with a gym, playground, hostel, mess, canteen, and library. Most importantly, this college is situated just near the Kutch district's biggest general hospital. So clinical knowledge can be obtained. In the hostel, the rooms are average, but the cleanliness is superb. Wi-Fi service is not available but other necessities can be fulfilled. The hostel is divided into 7 blocks from A to G, A and G blocks are for UG girls, B, C, D, and E are the blocks for UG boys, and E block is for PG students. Mess food is good compared to other nearby medical colleges. Sports equipments are available and space is provided.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Insight of Gujarat Adani Institute of Medical Sciences

content.Placements: Batch size of Gujarat Adani Institute of Medical Sciences is 150 students in total. MBBS is done in four and a half years, and there is one year of internship that is compulsory to complete to get the degree. Students get 18 thousand per month for their internship.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the course is well maintained by the college staff. The college is located in the beautiful city of Bhuj in Kutch. The college has a big campus for the hostel and a combined hospital for internship. The hostel is divided into 4 buildings for boys and 2 buildings for girls.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: I like hostel, and I also enjoy our hostel life.

content.Placements: Our MBBS course is about 4.5 years and 1-year of internships are seen. After completing MBBS, many jobs are offered by private hospitals, and students can opt for higher studies as well.
content.Infrastructure: Hostel infrastructure is very good and attractive. I like our hostel more than my home. I like to stay at the hostel more than home, because the infrastructure, friends, and environment are fine. In every room, cupboard is available. Three boys stay in every room, and every student has one bed, one plug at the site of the bed, and a cupboard. Timely cleaning services are provided by hostel guards, and good security is available. Classrooms are also available. Air-conditioners are provided in the classroom. Projectors and benches are also good.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: It is a great college for facilities, good placements and really good infrastructure.

content.Placements: 75% of students got placed in our course. 50% of students got internships from our course and MBBS students in the medical profession. Our course is the best for future.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi connection on our campus has low speed. The campus has labs and the best classrooms with AC. The library is available for reading, and library time for all students is from 9 am to 12 am, which is the best. Our campus has sports and medical facilities, and they are the best. A mess and canteen are also available.
content.Faculty: All the faculty are knowledgeable, and their teaching quality is the best. In our college, we have 4 exams per year, and university exams are important for our upgrade to the next year. It is not difficult to pass semester exams in our college.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: The college has good infrastructure and good facilities.

content.Placements: As the name of the college suggests that this college is for medical studies. It includes UG courses mainly as MBBS and also PG courses like ortho, dermatology, paediatrics, etc. It also includes paramedical courses like DMLT.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the campus includes all the necessary equipment for medical studies along with a gym, playground, hostel, mess, canteen, and library. Most importantly, this college is situated just near the Kutch district's biggest general hospital. So clinical knowledge can be obtained. In the hostel, the rooms are average, but the cleanliness is superb. Wi-Fi service is not available but other necessities can be fulfilled. individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Everything is fine here if you have contact in the senior batches.

content.Placements: If you are going into a medical field then you don't have to worry about anything like a placement in the first place, but yes in this college you can gain a lot of experience like how to interact and deal with different kinds of patients coming from different background.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is good, there's also a football ground here where we used to play football, and hostels are also in good condition, but yes in some hostels maintenance isn't up to the mark there are issues with cleanliness but yes otherwise it's good.

reviews.review_text: All facilities like classrooms, a library, labs, and a canteen are available on the campus, and they are well-maintained. It has a huge library and good labs. The canteen has many varieties of food. Mess facilities are also available on a yearly basis for 4 times a day. It has a calm environment, and the security is good.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best college for passing MBBS.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is the best. It is a fully Wi-Fi campus, with an air-conditioned library and classrooms. Our college also has an auditorium in which all events are conducted like convocation, etc. The auditorium has a capacity of 3,000 people, and it is fully on a central air-conditioner. The hostel is on our college campus. There are 5 blocks in which 2 blocks are for girls, and 3 blocks are for boys. Our college also has a canteen and mess facilities. Our college mess food is...

reviews.review_heading: Gujarat adani institute of medical sciences.
reviews.review_text:
The facilities provides by the college are good. 
There are in total 5 lecture halls with capacity of around 200+ students. 
All the departments have the lab facility. The central library of the college has all the UG and PG courses books and also it has the latest journals published in medical field and there is also computer facility available. 
Hostel facility is good and the quality of food in mess is also okay .

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with our college because of faculty members, infrastructure and facilities provided.
reviews.review_text: We have well light and air-conditioned classrooms, which has the capacity to accommodate 160 students. A Wi-Fi connection is available for internet-related activities. There is a very good library where many books and videos are available for studying. The quality of the facilities in the hostel is very good, and the quality of food served in the mess and the college canteen is fine. We have an established basketball court and a garden for sports and games.

reviews.review_heading: A review of Gujarat Adani Institute of Medical Sciences.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is very good. The campus is spread over 27 acres, so it is quite huge. There is a big government hospital on the campus. A huge library is present where students can study peacefully.

reviews.review_heading: Aims, a stable by a student.
reviews.review_text: We have hostel rooms with three sharing. We have a lecture hall that can accommodate all the batches at once and is air-conditioned. Our library has three floors with working hours from 6 a.m. to 2 a.m. The hostel rooms are very neat and clean, with various furniture provided. Each student is given a bed, a cupboard, a desk, and a chair. Bathrooms and toilets are general.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Gujarat Adani Institute of Medical Sciences.
reviews.review_text: All the department staff are awesome and well experienced. The college has all the laboratories for multiple subjects. There are 4-5 lecture halls and a huge auditorium. A 3-floor library is available 24/7, and students can read there peacefully. There is a canteen, basketball ground etc.

reviews.review_heading: All about GAIMS campus. Overall nice experience.
reviews.review_text: Four times Food is provided at the mess. Positive vibes in the hostel: proper security and rooms with proper ventilation. Rooms have fans, tube light study tables and chairs, and a bed for each student. A total of three students are allowed to stay per room.

review_content.Placements: 90 percent of students are placed. The packages offered are 3.6 LPA, 2.4 LPA, and 1.2 LPA. Top recruiting companies are Sun Pharma, Dr. Reddy's, Pfizer, Aurobindo, Hetero, and Novartis. It is not an internship but 100 percent placement. Roles offered include direct patient care, industry roles such as R&D scientist, QA/QC officer, medical writers, regulatory affairs, sales/marketing, and government roles like drug inspector and jhospital pharmacist, focusing on drug development, safety, quality, and patient counseling.
review_content.Infrastructure: Modern, air-conditioned smart classrooms, advanced tech-enabled labs, and a library with digital access are available, supported by 24/7 Wi-Fi and sports facilities. Now, the quality of the hostel facilities is better compared to before. The facilities now serve good food with good-quality mess and canteen. Medical facilities are available 24/7 with an ambulance. All sports are conducted, and all games competitions are held.

overview_faqs.question: What are the fees for MCA programmes at Vignan's Foundation for Science, Technology & Research?
overview_faqs.answer: The Vignan Foundation for Science, Technology, and Research's Master of Computer Applications (MCA) programme costs Rs 70,000. The cost of tuition is Rs 2.00 lakh. The cost of the online MCA programme is Rs 50,000 per year for students from SAARC and India. There are 310 places available for the MCA programme at Vignan's Foundation for Science, Technology, and Research. Rs 5.13 LPA is the average bundle amount. The Vignan's Foundation for Science, Technology, and Research pays back fees. Students having EAMCET scores under 8000, VSAT scores under 50, Intermediate scores above 975, and JEE scores over 175 points receive a full return of their expenses.

overview_faqs.question: Can I get free seat in Vignan University?
overview_faqs.answer: The scholarship seats are alloted in all programmees on the basis of merit, number of seats and first come first served basis at Vignan University. The scholarship is applicable for four years of study subject to maintaining a minimum of 70% aggregate in the preceding year (s) without any backlogs.

review_summary.college_name: Vignan's Foundation for Science, Technology and Research Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: I'm satisfied with the services that Vignan University offers.

content.Placements: 80 percent of the students got placed in construction companies. Some got placements in cement production companies as plant engineers and quality control engineers. The highest package is 6 LPA, and the lowest is 4 LPA. The top recruiting companies, I'm not really sure, since I'm yet to graduate.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi connection is top-notch, the Wi-Fi at the classroom, library, and the hostel is good, which means you can do your projects from anywhere on the campus. The mess is still in good structure, even the labs are up to standard, but there is room for improvement.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: We go on field visits to different companies and also do field projects.

content.Placements: 80% of the last batch got placement in construction companies, Ready-Mix Concrete Companies, and Infosys. Plant Engineer and Control Engineer roles are offered. 50% to 60% of civil students get internships through college, and some do research honours, which are funded by the university, and some participate in local government projects. The highest package is 6PA, the lowest package is 3 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: We have a software skills lab ( Autocad, Staad Pro, Revit, Primavera), a department library which has our books and also some ancient collections on the subject. We have a lab the size of a warehouse, which is divided into many sections to accommodate the equipment used in our practical subjects.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharm.) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Great academics and infra, average placements, supportive faculty, vibrant campus life.

content.Placements: 90 percent of students are placed. The packages offered are 3.6 LPA, 2.4 LPA, and 1.2 LPA. Top recruiting companies are Sun Pharma, Dr. Reddy's, Pfizer, Aurobindo, Hetero, and Novartis. It is not an internship but 100 percent placement. Roles offered include direct patient care, industry roles such as R&D scientist, QA/QC officer, medical writers, regulatory affairs, sales/marketing, and government roles like drug inspector and jhospital pharmacist, focusing on drug development, safety, quality, and patient counseling.
content.Infrastructure: Modern, air-conditioned smart classrooms, advanced tech-enabled labs, and a library with digital access are available, supported by 24/7 Wi-Fi and sports facilities. Now, the quality of the hostel facilities is better compared to before. The facilities now serve good food with good-quality mess and canteen. Medical facilities are available 24/7 with an ambulance. All sports are conducted, and all games competitions are held.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Vignan the great college, which is on 650 acres of land.

content.Placements: I am currently studying in 1 year of CSM totally 29% of students have been selected for our course. 19 LPA is the highest in our college till now. I heard there are companies like Infosys, TCS, and Amazon that are coming for the hiring, and mostly all of the members got the internship.
content.Infrastructure: Our college infrastructure is good, it was built on 650 acres. We don't get a signal since it is in the forest. We had a library whose infrastructure is awesome, and it has lots of book which helps to improve our knowledge. The food available in the hostel is quite good.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Everything is acceptable.

content.Placements: Around 70% of students get placed in my course. The highest package is 12 LPA, the lowest is 4 LPA, and the average package offered is 6 LPA. Top recruiting companies for my course are TCS, Wipro, etc. Around 70% of students get internships in TCS, and the remaining get internships in Wipro. Top roles offered in my course are Web Development, Hackathons, and Coding Competitions.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is very good. Wi-Fi is available 24/7. Classrooms are clean, and labs are available for individual subjects. The library is open all seven days of the week. The hostel is clean, with single, double, triple, four, and seven bed rooms available. Canteens are available both in the campus and hostel. Medical facilities are available. Many types of sports are available, such as basketball and volleyball.

admission_overview.college_name: Vignan's Foundation for Science, Technology and Research Admissions 2025: Eligibility, Process & Deadlines

paragraphs: Vignan University admission process 2025is mainly based onentrance examscores. The university acceptsVSAT,EAMCET, JEE Main,ICET,CAT, MAT, GATE & NET for course admission.VSATis a written test conducted by Vignan University. Interested candidates can apply online by visiting the university's official website.

Vignan's Foundation for Science, Technology and Research(Vignan University) offers degree and integrated programmes to aspirants at the undergraduate(UG), postgraduate(PG)and doctorate(PhD)levels. There are various specialisations available atVignan Universitywhich are Engineering, Business & Management Studies, and IT & Software.

Vignan University is open for 2025 admission to its different courses. It offers over40 coursesat UG and PG levels through various departments including Computer Science Engineering, Electronics and Communication Engineering, Electrical and Electronics Engineering and more. Check out the Vignan University admission 2025 details below:
Particulars
Vignan UniversityAdmissionHighlights 2025
Mode of study
Full-time/ Offline
Application status 2025
Fee range across the courses
INR 2 lakh – INR 11.2 lakh
Programmes Offered
Level of programmes offered
UG, PG & Doctoral
Popular programmes

Vignan University offers admission todifferent coursesincluding BTech, BPharma, BSc, BBA, BA, MTech, MBA, MCA & MSc courses. Candidates are selected based on various national-level entrance tests, such as VSAT, JEE Main, GATE, AP EAMCET, etc. TheV-SATexam pattern mirrors that of JEE Main and EAMCET; sample papers are available for download on Vignan's website.
Below are the eligibility and selection criteria for Vignan University courses admission:
Eligibility
Minimum 50 % - 70% aggregate in graduation
MAT/ CAT/ CMAT/ ICET
Minimum 55 % aggregate in BSc/ BCA
Minimum 50 % aggregate in Class 12
VJET (Vignan Joint Admission Test)
Minimum 60 % aggregate in Class 12
JEE Main/ JEE Advanced/ VSAT
Minimum 60 % aggregate in Class 12
Merit-Based
Minimum 60 % aggregate in Class 12
AP EAMCET/VSAT
Minimum 50 % aggregate in Class 12
VJET (Vignan Joint Admission Test)
Minimum 60% aggregate in qualifying exam
GATE/ CSIR NET + Written Test

Vignan University fees include various components, such astuition, hostel, etc. Some of the fee components are charged one-time, while some have to be paid semester-wise or annually, such as tuition fees.

Coming to affordability, it is one of the reasons why many leave a degree or a college. While the availability of education loans and scholarships has made education easy the terms and conditions required to become eligible for a student loan or a scholarship often stand as a challenge.
Find below theVignan University tuition feealong with average package details for some of the courses:

Vignan University has many seats available for BTech and MBA programme. The university also grants admission on the basis of total intake for each course. The table below provides the seat intake details for some of the courses offered at Vignan University:
Seats Intake

Reservation

Before applying to Vignan University, candidates must meet the eligibility requirements of their desired course. The basic eligibility criteria for the UG course is a minimum of 60% aggregate in the Class 12 / Intermediate examination. Candidates need to follow the below process to get admission in Vignan University:
Step 1:Application
Candidates must apply on the official websitevignan.ac.in/newvignan
Step 2: Selection Round

Vignan University admissions will be based on the performance in entrance examsVSAT/EAMCET/JEE/CAT/MATetc. The merit list for admission will be prepared based on therankobtained in the mentioned entrance exams.
Step 3: Counselling Round
Candidates will be called for counselling at the Vignan's University premises atVadlamudi, Guntur District, A.P.
Step 4: Documents Verification
Vignan University admissions are subject to verification from original documents. Admission can be cancelled if required documents aren't submitted before the deadline.

faqs.question: Can I get into Vignan's Foundation for Science, Technology & Research with 70%?
faqs.answer: Vignan's Foundation for Science, Technology & Research (VFSTR) University offers many undergraduate, postgraduate, and research programs in the field of Science and technology. The criteria for admission for these programs depend on the course you are choosing. For example, the B.Sc in Maths, Statistics, and Computer Science programme requires a minimum of 70% in the Intermediate (10+2) examination in PCM or MEC discipline.The general eligibilty for admission isHigher Secondary Examination(12th)

faqs.question: Can I get free seat in Vignan University?
faqs.answer: The scholarship seats are alloted in all programmees on the basis of merit, number of seats and first come first served basis at Vignan University. The scholarship is applicable for four years of study subject to maintaining a minimum of 70% aggregate in the preceding year (s) without any backlogs.

faqs.question: What is the admission process at Vignan's Foundation for Science, Technology and Research?
faqs.answer: The application process for Vignans Foundation for Science, Technology and Research is conducted online. Candidates can apply online on the official website of college. Fill the form for opted course. Students have to qualify the entrance exam for that particular course. they have to upload the documents. Pay the application fee to finalise the application process.

faqs.question: Do I need to pay any fee apart from the tuition fee for doing BPharm from Vignan University?
faqs.answer: Candidates who get admission to the BPharm programme offered at Vignan's Foundation for Science, Technology and Research are required to pay the tuition fees of INR 11.20 Lakh. However, candidates are also required to pay one-time fees of INR 20,000 and, hostel fees of INR 3.85 Lacs as asked by the University during the course of the programme. Note: This information is sourced from official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.

In the meantime, students can check out the sections below to get an idea of Vignan University MBA cutoff trends for different exams. A few more updates are given below:

Vignan's Foundation for Science, Technology and Research MBA cutoff 2024 has been released for admission to its MBA/PGDM course. highlights.description: Vignan University is one of the most popular institutes of the country. Most of the ranking bodies have recognised this institute as one of the popular choices among students. The institute has been ranked #70 by the NIRF 2025 under the category University, and #80 under Engineering. The institute has been ranked well by eminent ranking bodies because of its curriculum, infrastructure and well-qualified faculty. Students can check the article in this space for more details around the Vignan University rankings.

nirf.description:
Vignan University has received strong ranks by the NIRF under the 'Overall' category. Provided parameters including, Teaching, Graduation Outcome, Inclusivity and Research, the institute is ranked in a good position as compared to other institutes by the NIRF 2025. In the 'Overall' category, the institute's ranks have shown stability when evaluated against previous year's ranking. In 2025, Vignan University's rank is #101, the same as last year's rank in the 'Overall' category by the NIRF ranking.
One can observe that within the category of 'University', the institute's ranking has scaled up when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2025, Vignan University climbed 2 ranks to #70 rank in the 'University' category by the NIRF ranking. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has ascended in the rankings.
It is to be noticed that the institute has shown a fluctuating trend in the 'Engineering' category as compared to the ranking of preceding years. In 2025, Vignan University climbed 11 ranks to #80 rank in the 'Engineering' category by the NIRF ranking.
Find below the latest rankings and category breakdowns from several ranking bodies.
Read less

outlook.description:
Vignan University has received strong ranks by the Outlook under the 'Technical Universities (Private)' category. Provided parameters including, Teaching, Graduation Outcome, Inclusivity and Research, the institute is ranked in a good position as compared to other institutes by the Outlook 2025. In the 'Technical Universities (Private)' category, the institute's ranks have descended when evaluated against previous year's ranking. In 2025, Vignan University fell 5 ranks to #13 rank in the 'Technical Universities (Private)' category by the Outlook ranking.
It has been seen that in the 'Deemed To Be University' category, the institute's ranking has scaled up when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2025, Vignan University climbed 12 ranks to #23 rank in the 'Deemed To Be University' category by the Outlook ranking.
Find below the latest rankings and category breakdowns from several ranking bodies.
Read less

qs_world.description:
Vignan University has been ranked well by the QS World University Rankings under the 'Asia' category. Through the years, the QS World University Rankings for Vignan University indicate the institute's strong performance in important areas such as the Quality of Education, Conducting Impactful Research, the Expertise of Faculty members, and Overall Institutional Management. These good rankings not only prove the institute's good reputation but also highlight its excellence across diverse domains, evaluated against the standards established by the QS World University Rankings. It has been seen that in the 'Asia' category, the institute's ranks have shown a decreasing trend when evaluated against the ranking of the prior year. In 2026, Vignan University fell 250 ranks to #1101 rank in the 'Asia' category by the QS World University Rankings. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has slipped in the rankings.
It has been seen that within the category of 'Southern Asia', the institute's ranking has fallen when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2026, Vignan University fell 84 ranks to #362 rank in the 'Southern Asia' category by the QS World University Rankings. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has slipped in the rankings.
Explore the most recent rankings from other ranking bodies and their respective categories below.
