reviews.review_heading: I'm satisfied with the services that Vignan University offers.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi connection is top-notch, the Wi-Fi at the classroom, library, and the hostel is good, which means you can do your projects from anywhere on the campus. The mess is still in good structure, even the labs are up to standard, but there is room for improvement.

reviews.review_heading: We go on field visits to different companies and also do field projects.
reviews.review_text: We have a software skills lab ( Autocad, Staad Pro, Revit, Primavera), a department library which has our books and also some ancient collections on the subject. We have a lab the size of a warehouse, which is divided into many sections to accommodate the equipment used in our practical subjects.

reviews.review_heading: Great academics and infra, average placements, supportive faculty, vibrant campus life.
reviews.review_text: Modern, air-conditioned smart classrooms, advanced tech-enabled labs, and a library with digital access are available, supported by 24/7 Wi-Fi and sports facilities. Now, the quality of the hostel facilities is better compared to before. The facilities now serve good food with good-quality mess and canteen. Medical facilities are available 24/7 with an ambulance. All sports are conducted, and all games competitions are held.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2029Offered by Vignan’s Foundation for Science, Technology and Research, HyderabadReviewed on 8 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Vignan the great college, which is on 650 acres of land.
reviews.review_text: Our college infrastructure is good, it was built on 650 acres. We don't get a signal since it is in the forest. We had a library whose infrastructure is awesome, and it has lots of book which helps to improve our knowledge. The food available in the hostel is quite good.

reviews.review_heading: Everything is acceptable.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is very good. Wi-Fi is available 24/7. Classrooms are clean, and labs are available for individual subjects. The library is open all seven days of the week. The hostel is clean, with single, double, triple, four, and seven bed rooms available. Canteens are available both in the campus and hostel. Medical facilities are available. Many types of sports are available, such as basketball and volleyball.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with the faculty and facilities provided, but attendance is mandatory for every subject 75
reviews.review_text: Vignan University offers a Wi-Fi campus, good labs, smart classrooms, and a rich library. Hostels are decent with AC/non-AC rooms. The food is okay but repetitive. The medical centre is available. Sports facilities are strong with courts, grounds, and coaching. Vignan.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied that the college offers a variety of courses.
reviews.review_text: The quality of food is good and the wardens are friendly with the students. We can easily get our doubts sorted. The faculty teaches well, and the college infrastructure is very good. The management provides various opportunities to enhance your skills. The events are done by the student bodies.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Vignan’s Foundation for Science, Technology and Research, HyderabadReviewed on 1 Nov 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Absolutely dissatisfied because of faculty. Good placements in 2024, not good.
reviews.review_text: No proper number of classrooms. No proper Wi-Fi. Hostels are good with a good menu and good food. No sports or any activities. The canteen is okay, not the best taste. The quality of food is not much better. The cost of food is more expensive than at other colleges.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and facilities, good placements, and satisfied with faculty members.
reviews.review_text: There are different kinds of facilities available in college. Wi-Fi is available on every floor in every building. Library is available with various books from all the departments. Wi-Fi is available in the library. Infrastructure of the buildings is very good with canteen and water on each floor. Hostel in nice with 3 and 4 sharing rooms both AC and non-AC. Food quality and quantity are very good, and the food is also hygienic. Medical facilities are there all times in hostels with all essentia...

reviews.review_heading: Somewhat satisfied with the content learnt in college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is very good. Wi-Fi faculty is available 24*7, classrooms are clean, and labs are available for individual subjects. The library is open all seven days of the week. The hostel is clean. Single, double, triple, four, and seven B.Ed. rooms are available. The canteen is available both on campus and hostel. Medical faculty is available. There are many different types of sports available.

reviews.review_heading: Somewhat satisfied by the faculty teaching.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is very good. Wi-Fi facility is available 24/7. Classrooms are clean, and computers are available for individuals. Library is open all seven days of the week. Hostel is clean. Double, triple, four, and seven sharing beds are available. Canteen is available on both campus and hostel. Medical facility is available. There are many different types of sports available like cricket, kabaddi, volleyball, etc.

reviews.review_heading: Great campus life with supportive faculty members.
reviews.review_text: Vignan University offers Wi-Fi enabled smart classrooms, advanced computer and research labs, a digital library, and a seminar hall. Hostels are clean with good amenities. It has 24X7 Wi-Fi, tasty food, and medical care. It provides excellent sports, gym, and recreation.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college with a righteous learning but you should learn yourself only.
reviews.review_text: The facilities are not up to the mark, but not below the mark either. All classes have Wi-Fi connections, and the labs are well-equipped. Classrooms are decent and air-conditioned. The library is open for 12 hours daily, but during exam time it is available 24/7. Hostels are decent, and the food quality is nice, the mess is very large. There is a 24/7 ambulance service for both girls’ and boys’ hostels. In addition, sports facilities are available for all types of games, and students are sent to...

reviews.review_heading: Totally the worst-managed college. You can join just to get the degree.
reviews.review_text: The department provides free Wi-Fi in all buildings, excluding the main campus hostel. It has a digital lab and classrooms. The library is well-maintained. The mess food has a repeated menu, and they don't maintain hygiene. Totally South Indian food is available, not good for North Indian.

reviews.review_heading: Excellent learning experience with good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The classrooms are very neat, clean, and peaceful. When we go to the library, we don’t feel like coming back because it is so calm, well-maintained, and a perfect place to study. All the necessary books are available in the library, so there is no difficulty in finding what we want to read.

review_summarisation.heading: What students say about Vignan's Foundation for Science, Technology and Research

likes.text: Top recruiting companies like TCS, Infosys, Tech Mahindra, Accenture, ServiceNow, Wipro, Cognizant, DXC, etc., visit our college for placements.
Students did an internship in companies like L&T, My Home Constructions, local construction companies, CRDA and some environmental companies like Sri Sai Manasa Nature Tech.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: It is a very good college in terms of education.

content.Placements: Almost 100% of students got placed in our college. The highest salary package offered was 1.5 LPA. The average salary package offered was 1.25 LPA. The lowest salary package offered was Rs. 90,000 per annum. Top recruiting companies are Cipla, Benelli, etc. Many pharmacists visit our college for recruitment. Internships are offered in this course. The top role offered is drug inspector.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is average. Our college provides top-class facilities such as laboratories, Wi-Fi, etc. Classrooms are average. Hostel is very good. The hostel rooms are spacious. Separate washrooms are available on every floor. Medical facilities are available in our college. The food served in the canteen is average. Sports are conducted in this college.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Our college has very good teachers. It maintains discipline very well.

content.Placements: Almost 80% of students got internships in the 4th year. The highest salary package offered is 1.5 LPA. The average salary package offered is Rs. 70,000 per annum, and the lowest salary package offered is Rs. 30,000 per annum. Almost 70% of students got placed in our college.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is beautiful. Our college has a specific library and a lab. The hostel facility is not good. There is no good food and water supply in the canteen. All classrooms have cameras.
content.Faculty: All teachers are good and qualified. They are M.Pharm qualified. They are Ph.D. holders. They care for students very well. Exams are conducted very strictly. Our college's headmasters are very good. They are intelligent.

reviews.review_text: Our classrooms were spacious. Tables and chairs were in good condition. Fans and lights were fine. The atmosphere in the classrooms and labs was pleasant. The library was always silent. We could take any type of book based on pharmacy. The hostel facilities were excellent. Toilets were in good condition. Water was available at all times, and the food in the hostel was tasty. All medical stores, stationery stores, and hotels were conveniently located near the college. Sports were conducted once.

reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is somewhat average I think because in this college, we pay fees above 1 lakh, so we expect good infrastructure but our gain is not as much as we think. Hostel is the worst for the boys and food is also the worst. For girls, I don't know. If you are a boy then my advice is to not choose the hostel.

reviews.review_heading: It is one of the best colleges.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. The laboratory equipment is provided. The campus is neat and clean. The hostel is good and well-maintained. Discipline and neatness are maintained. Every day, the campus, labs and classrooms are sanitized.

The food served in the hostel is good. Medical facilities are good.

paragraphs: Candidates must apply for the course of their choice as a first step. The institute selects candidates for admission based on their merit in the entrance exam or qualifying exam. Below is the step-wise NIMR Mumbai admission process:
STEP 1: NIMR Mumbai Application Process 2025
Candidates meeting the eligibility criteria can apply online on the official website of the institute. Aspirants first need to choose a course and then fill the form.
STEP 2: Selection

Once the registration is over, the institute evaluates the applications of the candidates. Admission to all courses except MBA is based on merit in the last qualifying exam. The institute considers the Management entrance exam scores for admission to the MBA.
STEP 3: Admission Confirmation
Selected candidates are informed about their admission. They need to pay a course fee to confirm their seat in the institute.

placement_report.college_name: National Institute of Management and Research Studies Placement & Salary Insights

placement_data.title: National Institute of Management and Research Studies Placement Overview 2024
paragraphs: According to unofficial sources, the highest and average package offered during National Institute of Management and Research Studies placements 2023 stood at INR 6 LPA and INR 5 LPA , respectively. The top recruiters of National Institute of Management and Research Studies in recent past included leading companies such as Reckitt Benckiser , Viacom 18 , Ogilvy and Boston Consultancy Group.

faqs.question: Does National Institute of Management and Research Studies (NIMR) have good placements?
faqs.answer: It is true that the National Institute of Management and Research Studies (NIMR) offers quality job placements. High-end recruiters highly value the well-rounded professionals that NIMR produces and its solid reputation for delivering high-quality education. To give students plenty of options for internships and full-time jobs, the institute maintains a specialised placement cell that collaborates closely with top businesses in a range of industries. NIMR has a 90% placement rate for its graduating batches, according to the institute's official website. Numerous alumni of the school have secured positions at reputable corporations, including IBM, TCS, Wipro, Infosys, and HCL. In startups and entrepreneurial endeavors, some students have also been placed.

faqs.question: What is the highest package for MBA students at NIMR, Mumbai?
faqs.answer: The highest package for MBA students at NIMR, Mumbai was just Rs 5,85,000. the highest placement was offered by cognizant to 12 students. The placement scenerio is not good in college, it has been decreased from previous years. Some of the top recruiters at NIMR Mumbai include Ogilvy, BCG, Viacom 18, Tata Consultancy Services, Deloitte, and Ernst & Young.

faqs.question: How are MBA placements at NIMR, Mumbai?
faqs.answer: According to unofficial sources, the highest and average package offered during National Institute of Management and Research Studies (NIMR) placements in 2023 stood at INR 6 LPA and INR 5 LPA , respectively. However, it’s essential to verify this information directly with the institute for the most accurate and up-to-date details. The average package of NIMR is not yet disclosed for this year. But looking at the market and the course the package that the students are getting is not that good. Having a 6LPA package with an MBA degree is not satisfying. Placements are not so good at NIMR, Mumbai. The latest details are often provided by the college through official reports, placement brochures, or direct communication with the placement cell.

highlights.summary: The NEET UG 2026 registration window is now closed for admission to the MBBS, BDS, and other courses. The exam is scheduled for May 3, 2026.

reviews_list.review_title: Good infrastructure with good facilities and faculty.

review_content.Placements: 70% students are placed per year in any hospital or clinic Avg Package of 50,000 is offered to avg students Many top reputed hospital hiers us for the doctor's post Every student who passed final year gets the internship in our own college hospital and other hospital as well.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is well developed and 90 years old And new buildings are under construction There are different departments for each subject and library reading room digital library canteen mess and all others facilities are available Sports department is also there.

reviews_list.batch_info: BAMS - Bachelor of Ayurvedic Medicine and Surgery - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: It is a very good college in terms of teaching and encouraging.

review_content.Placements: Medical students have to search for their jobs and careers. However, teachers guide students on what to do, how to run a clinic, etc. In their guidance, selecting this college is not an issue but choosing a career depends on students.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is very good. The lab, a museum, etc., everything which is needed for the course is present in our college. I am proud of that. The matter is about how we are going to utilise it. The garden and campus are very beautiful. For an Ayurvedic student, half of his life is going to be spent in the garden, so it is good.

reviews_list.batch_info: BAMS - Bachelor of Ayurvedic Medicine and Surgery - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: We have a great infrastructure and a very good teaching faculty.

review_content.Placements: We don't have placement. Mostly, we need to find a job outside. Unlike any other field, we cannot sit on any placement opportunities, we need to find the best for ourselves. Mainly, we don't aim in placement at the same institution, we can have many other opportunities.
review_content.Infrastructure: We have Wi-Fi access, a spacious library, and all the facilities are good. The classrooms can accommodate all 100 students and have good ventilation outdoor campus is also good. The faculty is good with great knowledge, and all staff respond equally and are very well qualified.

individual_reviews.course: BAMS - Bachelor of Ayurvedic Medicine and Surgery - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Good infrastructure with good facilities and faculty.

content.Placements: 70% students are placed per year in any hospital or clinic Avg Package of 50,000 is offered to avg students Many top reputed hospital hiers us for the doctor's post Every student who passed final year gets the internship in our own college hospital and other hospital as well.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is well developed and 90 years old And new buildings are under construction There are different departments for each subject and library reading room digital library canteen mess and all others facilities are available Sports department is also there.

individual_reviews.course: BAMS - Bachelor of Ayurvedic Medicine and Surgery - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: It is a very good college in terms of teaching and encouraging.

content.Placements: Medical students have to search for their jobs and careers. However, teachers guide students on what to do, how to run a clinic, etc. In their guidance, selecting this college is not an issue but choosing a career depends on students.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is very good. The lab, a museum, etc., everything which is needed for the course is present in our college. I am proud of that. The matter is about how we are going to utilise it. The garden and campus are very beautiful. For an Ayurvedic student, half of his life is going to be spent in the garden, so it is good.

individual_reviews.course: BAMS - Bachelor of Ayurvedic Medicine and Surgery - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: We have a great infrastructure and a very good teaching faculty.

content.Placements: We don't have placement. Mostly, we need to find a job outside. Unlike any other field, we cannot sit on any placement opportunities, we need to find the best for ourselves. Mainly, we don't aim in placement at the same institution, we can have many other opportunities.
content.Infrastructure: We have Wi-Fi access, a spacious library, and all the facilities are good. The classrooms can accommodate all 100 students and have good ventilation outdoor campus is also good. The faculty is good with great knowledge, and all staff respond equally and are very well qualified.

review_content.Placements: A total of 50 students join the college every year, out of which 9 are from AIQ, 20 from NE Open Quota, and the rest are subdivided amongst Nagaland, Mizoram, Arunachal Pradesh and Meghalaya. The cancer wing, new hostels, and other new buildings are currently under development. The total number of MBBS seats will increase in the upcoming years. The stipend offered for internships is Rs. 23,500 per month.
review_content.Infrastructure: There is a huge library with many books and Wi-Fi facilities. A computer lab is available in our college. The library is open from 9 am to 9 pm in summer and from 9 am to 7 pm in winter. Many routine and special studies are available in our biochemistry, pathology, and other departments to diagnose many cases, including RTPCR and CBNAAT for COVID-19 diagnosis. There are currently four lecture theaters, and it will be increased once the new buildings are ready. Our college conducts classes in clinical teaching rooms for every department.

paragraphs: North Eastern Indira Gandhi Regional Institute of Health And Medical Sciences admission2025 is both merit and entrance-based.North Eastern Indira Gandhi Regional Institute of Health And Medical Sciencesoffers 23 courses to the students across various specialisations. Courses are offered at UG, PG and Advanced Masters levels.

At the UG level, North Eastern Indira Gandhi Regional Institute of Health And Medical Sciences offers various courses, such asMBBS, B.Sc., and many more. Similarly, at the PG level, students can pursue various courses, such asMD, M.Sc., etc.
The duration of UG courses is 66 months - 4 years. For PG programmes, the duration depends on the specialisations and typically is 2 years - 3 years.
